description: User taps Add to cart on a product card or product detail page
User taps Add on the product detail page bottom bar
User successfully requests an OTP on the login page (registered user with catalog access)
User successfully verifies OTP and is logged in
User searches for a product in the catalog or product detail search overlay
Authenticated user views the Buy Again page and has past order history (top of re-purchase funnel)
Add PostHog reverse proxy rewrites to route /ingest/* through Next.js to avoid ad blockers
Improve PostHog client init with defaults, capture_exceptions, and reverse proxy api_host
